name: Neon Cyberpunk
description: Futuristic cyberpunk style with neon glows, dark backgrounds, and holographic overlays — perfect for sci-fi or tech-themed storyboards.
prompt_template: 9:16 portrait canvas 1080x1920px, cyberpunk neon poster style, deep dark navy-black background (#0a0e1a), subtle diagonal scan-line overlay at 20% opacity, centered rectangular full-color high-saturation cinematic photograph of {subject}, two neon glow strips in electric cyan (#00f0ff) and hot magenta (#ff00aa) at 80% opacity flanking the photo edges with soft light bleed, {text_section}futuristic holographic aesthetic, synthwave vibes, clean digital finish, lens flare accents, chromatic aberration on photo edges
text_section_template: bold sans-serif glowing text below photo reading '{text_overlay}' in electric cyan (#00f0ff) with soft outer glow,

dimensions.format_use_case: mobile screen, Instagram Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts

image_style.technique: layered digital — photograph + neon glow strips + scan-line overlay + holographic typography

background.texture: deep dark navy with subtle noise grain

main_photo.contrast: high contrast — deep shadows, vivid highlights
main_photo.shadow: neon glow shadow — cyan and magenta
main_photo.subject: {{SUBJECT_DESCRIPTION}}

brush_strokes.style: neon light strip / glow bar — sharp, clean, digital
brush_strokes.finish: glowing with soft light bleed / bloom effect

placement.position: left side of photo, vertical neon strip
right side of photo, vertical neon strip

brush_strokes.layer_order: neon strips in front of photo edges with glow bleeding outward

typography.font_feel: clean geometric sans — like a HUD display or tech interface
typography.glow: soft outer glow in cyan, 12px radius

layer_stack_bottom_to_top: 4. Cyan neon strip — left side (on top of photo edge)
5. Magenta neon strip — right side (on top of photo edge)
image_style.mood: futuristic, cyberpunk, electric, high-tech, immersive, cinematic
